# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: docker-build-agent
  labels:
    app: docker-build-agent
spec:
  restartPolicy: Never
  containers:
    - name: build
      image: docker:27.1.1-cli
      imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
      command: ["sh", "-c"]
      args:
        - |
          set -e
          docker version
          docker info
          sleep infinity
      env:
        - name: DOCKER_HOST
          value: unix:///var/run/docker.sock
      securityContext:
        privileged: true
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
        readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
        capabilities:
          add:
            - SYS_ADMIN
            - NET_ADMIN
            - DAC_OVERRIDE
            - SETUID
            - SETGID
            - CHOWN
      volumeMounts:
        - name: dockersock
          mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
        - name: dockerconfig
          mountPath: /root/.docker
          readOnly: true
  volumes:
    - name: dockersock
      hostPath:
        path: /var/run/docker.sock
        type: Socket
    - name: dockerconfig
      secret:
        secretName: docker-registry-config
        items:
          - key: config.json
            path: config.json
